item.title: kubeshark / kubeshark
item.description:
Desc: The API traffic viewer for Kubernetes providing real-time, protocol-aware visibility into Kubernetes’ internal network, capturing, dissecting and monitoring all traffic and payloads going in, out and across containers, pods, nodes and clusters. Think TCPDump and Wireshark re-invented for Kubernetes
Lang: Go
Star: 8504

Lang: Go
